title: Planning Board Minutes - 1201 Main Street
raw_text: Application for 1201 Main Street mixed-use redevelopment with 24 residential units was approved. Board members found the project consistent with the master plan and noted streetscape improvements.
cleaned_text: Application for 1201 Main Street mixed-use redevelopment with 24 residential units was approved. Board members found the project consistent with the master plan and noted streetscape improvements.
